title: Classic and Modern formats
summaryHTML:
Classic uses a USUM-style base with Level 100 play, EVs/IVs, standard PP, Champions ability/move/status mechanics, and legacy NatDex movesets without PLA or Z-A additions.

Modern uses a Champions base with Level 50 play, Stat Points, 31 IV lock, Champions ability/move/status mechanics, 8/12/16/20 PP, and PLA/Z-A move additions legalised.
author: Rasche
